title: micranthes stellaris var. prolifera
intro: Micranthes stellaris var. prolifera, also known as starry saxifrage, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of starry saxifrage include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties can be harnessed through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
